final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传赵灵儿).

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, nine panels, each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses as Zhao Ling'er
Scene/backdrop: white paper with torn circular holes as framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: original non-infringing character design inspired by Zhao Ling'er IP; nine distinct expressions and outfits as specified: top-left winking adjusting glasses in green sweater; top-center smirking lowering dark sunglasses in red leather jacket; top-right thinking finger on chin in yellow hoodie; middle-left big smile arms resting on edge in black and white striped shirt; middle-center smiling thumbs up in orange button-up shirt; middle-right neutral drinking boba tea in blue sweater; bottom-left happy waving in purple sweater vest over white shirt; bottom-center laughing with eyes closed arms crossed in pink cardigan; bottom-right silly poking cheeks in teal sweater
Avoid:
